channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride Injection (52536-125-10)
item.description: Dexmedetomidine Hydrochloride, Injection, 4 ug/1 mL (NDC 52536-125-10) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-05 Company: Azurity Pharmaceuticals, Inc Distributed by Wilshire Pharmaceuticals, Inc.

item.title: To Be Discontinued: Semaglutide Tablet (0169-4303-30)
item.description: Rybelsus, Tablet, 3 mg (NDC 0169-4303-30) Status: To Be Discontinued Updated: 2026-06-04 Company: Novo Nordisk, Inc. Discontinuation of the manufacture of the drug. These products will be replaced by Ozempic (semaglutide) tablets.
